words.meaning_en: Extreme scarcity of food leading to starvation

words.meaning_en: Something that motivates or encourages action

words.meaning_en: A strong expression of objection or disapproval

words.meaning_en: To stimulate a reaction, especially an angry one

words.meaning_en: The state of being united or joined as a whole

words.meaning_en: The health, happiness, and well-being of a person or group

words.fill_blank: Caste-based ______ is prohibited under the Indian Constitution.
